fields.description:
## Description
Duplication analyzer that runs jscpd (external CLI, JSON reporter) for copy/paste clone stats, populating `AnalyzerResult.duplication` (clone count + duplicated-lines percentage).

## Decisions resolving the blocking findings
- INVOCATION: reuse the EXISTING invocation from `scripts/backfill_complexity_clone_snapshots.py`, which shells the BARE binary `["jscpd", ...]`. This ticket does NOT change that to `npx jscpd` (no behavioral change to the backfill script). Availability = `jscpd` resolvable on PATH; absent -> Unavailable. (An `npx` fallback is explicitly OUT OF SCOPE here.)
- FIELDS: read `statistics.total.clones` (count) and `statistics.total.percentage` (duplicated-lines %) from the jscpd JSON report — the exact fields the backfill seam already reads.
- accruing_since: `jscpd_dup.py` holds a module-level `_ACCRUING_SINCE` constant (matching the existing reader modules) and passes it as `Unavailable(reason, accruing_since)` — NOT a single-arg call.

## Design: expand-contract
1. Extract the backfills jscpd runner + `statistics.total` read into a shared helper (e.g. `rebar.metrics.analyzers._jscpd.run_jscpd`).
2. Point BOTH the backfill script and `analyzers/jscpd_dup.py` at it; live in `src/rebar/metrics/analyzers/` (NOT the quarantined `adapters/`).

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `analyzers/jscpd_dup.py` runs jscpd (bare PATH binary) over the scan root, parses `statistics.total.clones` + `.percentage` via the shared helper.
- [ ] jscpd absent on PATH or error -> `Unavailable(reason, _ACCRUING_SINCE)`, not a crash and not zeros.
- [ ] Backfill scripts behavior unchanged (still bare `jscpd`).

## Verification (proof of reuse — the blocking gap)
- [ ] Unit asserts reuse by IMPORT: both `jscpd_dup.py` and the backfill script import `run_jscpd` from the shared helper (import/grep assertion), proving no re-implementation.
- [ ] Unit with a monkeypatched runner (no jscpd needed in CI); integration test skipped if jscpd absent, over a known-clone fixture.

## Dependencies: 3b30, 9597, e7a0 (recorded depends_on edges to all three).
## Files likely touched: src/rebar/metrics/analyzers/jscpd_dup.py (new), src/rebar/metrics/analyzers/_jscpd.py (new shared runner), scripts/backfill_complexity_clone_snapshots.py (point at shared helper), tests/unit/metrics/test_jscpd_dup.py (new)
## Estimated scope: M
